review_title: Great task management platform. Great freemium version!
description: Overall Bitrix24 has been great for my business. Having a place to see all the tasks, assign to employees and follow up on the work has really saved me time and money!
author: Paulo F.
pros: For task management it's FREE, it's easy to set up, it's easy to use.
cons: There are many features that I haven't had the chance to use because it would require me to take some time to review it, test, and implement with the team.

review_title: Bitrix24 is a All-in-One CRM platform that delivers
description: It has been good - the pros outweigh the cons. Bitrix24 works for: - Lead Management - Marketing - Call Center - HR & Employee Communications - Sales Management - Automations - Project Management - Website & Online Store Builder It's not a simplistic as HubSpot or Monday, so it may put some people off, but it is scalable without breaking the bank. If your business is 10+ employees, then Bitrix24 can offer massive subscription cost savings as the Professional subscription offers up to 100 User licenses.
author: Remy C.
pros: An All-In-One CRM that has loads of customisation that it is close to bespoke, but with the bonus that features are continuously being improved and developed within your subscription costs. It can be good straight out the box, but most customers will want to work with a Bitirx24 Partner so that it can be configured to integrate with your operations and enable massive efficiencies early into the adoption of Bitrix24. This will benefit your business in the long-term as you will look to utilise the 35+ functions - saving loads on additional subscriptions for Video Calling, E-Signatures, Cloud Storage, just to highlight a few.
cons: Daylight Saving seems to be an issue making appointments past the date the clocks change in UK, but a fix is being developed for this.

review_title: Terrible experience that only gets worse
author: Larissa R.
pros: Almost nothing, if i'm being honest. I can find most of the features in any of the best software companies in the market right now.
cons: I've been using Bitrix24 since last year, and I have to say: in the last few months, especially the last month, it feels like the platform has been abandoned and all the staff have been replaced by a dumb AI. Support has been taking days, if not weeks, to respond. We're experiencing an error with card merging that's been open for over a month. Changes are made out of the blue, without warning, and we have to constantly find new ways to do things. It seems to create more problems than solutions. No CRM card can be deleted, and merging doesn't work, so we created a column just to isolate cards that need to be merged and/or deleted. Automations don't pull updated numbers or contact names, so we have to create new cards when we correct someone's number or contact name, otherwise it sends automated messages with the old/incorrect information. We're constantly having problems connecting to WhatsApp, and we thought it was a Meta issue, but it's actually Bitrix. We're starting to evaluate new platforms to migrate our entire operation, and it's going to be a lot of work, but it looks like it'll be worth it.

review_title: Bitrix4 for CRM!
description: The software took some getting used to as it is a little complicated to learn at first. However, once the initial hurdle is crossed it is a very helpful software because it integrates CRM and communication so there is no need to keep switching between apps to keep track of tasks and workflows.
author: Shenella S.
pros: Centralized point for all CRM and communication workflows. Keeps it all on one place at a good price ! Extensive options available for customization which helps make the software really a part of the business! Offers great tools for take management.
cons: Initial set up takes time as it is not an easy software to use at first. Customer support is not that great and it can take days to solve issues within the software.

review_title: Great overall product and customer service
description: Love this system, hands down the best thing I found when I started my company and I use it in my other companies as well.
author: Christopher F.
pros: The customization of things, being able to make it what I needed for my company.
cons: Can be a little hard to learn and navigate at first, they offer partners to help with thing if you can afford it but I like to know how to do things. Once you learn it though it is super easy to use.

review_title: most popular CRM in CEE
description: It is good and well known. Focused mostly on trading business and integration with 1C. Large application need Contract management tools and bridge to SAP/Oracle solutions.
author: Andrii L.
pros: It was the most popular in Easter Europe solution for decade. Widely used in India and some asian countries. Bitrix24 is CRM system designed for integration with native 1C Enterprise/Sales solution. It have integrated HR module, that makes is capable to be standalone solution for marketing team. Has integrated task tracking and project management tools as well has integrated time tracker. It has build in secure disk space to share files and data.
cons: It is heavy weight and can slow down at deskt top use but awesomely fast on mobile. It has build in time tracker but no attendance controls. Focused mostly on 1C Enterprise integration for Customer module. Lot of manual iterations and need more automation for more leads loaded customers flow.

review_title: Great if you are linking sales to projects.
description: It was ok. I managed a number of projects with it while linking it to our sales department. It was good because we didn't have to jump from one software to another.
author: Amir H.
pros: It has both traditional and agile tools. You can have a Gantt chart as well as Boards and so on. It also combines projects with CRM, which is great for many project-based companies.
cons: It is a bit too complicated to use. It is not as intuitive as similar software applications in the market. While it is powerful, it is a bit confusing.

review_title: Best business process software
description: My experience is really good. i think bitrix is the best CRM in the market
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is a complete website like social media of a company where there is a feeds where you can see all the announcements of the company and CRM with different workflows you can edit.
cons: it is a bit expensive compare to other CRMs.

review_title: POV Review on Bitrix24
description: Generally, I like it only for the functions that I really use and need, but really, I feel the pricing is a rip-off.
author: Christopher C.
pros: Open Channels and messaging integrations with mostly all social media platforms and the website builder.
cons: I don't like the fact that I am forced to take and pay for plans that I don't even need most of the features simply because they are not applicable to my business operations. I hope that we can be allowed to tailor fit our plans so I can only select the features that I need and what I really use. I feel like I am wasting the value of money I pay because there are lots of features that I really don't need and don't want to use. I also hope that the Forms can be as diverse and customizable just like CognitoForms which is what I use for customer orders, I can't use the Bitrix24 Forms because it doesn't have the kind of flexibility of CognitoForms. CognitoForms is far more superior in this area.

review_title: Well established for large businesses
description: Too many videos to look over in tutorials Not knowing how customer support is rated. Didn't find it very convenient
author: Frank C.
pros: good collaboration amongst coworkers for project management. easy customization has user interface workflow can be efficient
cons: Not a value for the money. not very easy to use. can be complicated in organizing tasks to get efficiency going.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Much done, but still much to improve
description: I would love to see a place where users can submit their ideas for developing the app - and others vote on these ideas. The ideas with the most votes would be introduced first. At the moment, I don't know at what stage my amendment is being submitted, when it will be introduced and if it will be at all (because maybe it only bothers me).
author: Lukasz C.
pros: Great flexibility in the programme and the ability to add your own functions to many modules.
cons: Poorly developed very basic functions that issue the basis for work. Holiday requests - does not count remaining holiday days Chat - it is not possible to change status to e.g.: homeoffice (as is the case with slack). No autosave in tasks. Mail client that is completely undeveloped.

review_title: If you need a tool to make your business simple, look elsewhere
description: Bad, I've deleted my account after the trial since I had too many issues and lost time while working on it
author: Francesco D.
pros: Surely it's full of features, basically anything a CRM can have.
cons: Its price and assistance are very bad. It is very costly if you really want to use all of its feature and if you have just a simple problem and need to get in touch with the support team, it can be awful. Design can be better too.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: For our ops team, bitrix24 mixes communication and task tracking.
description: It has served as a replacement for a hodgepodge of spreadsheets, emails and chats. Now our team works from a unified dashboard, which significantly accelerated tracking shipments and making decisions.
author: Vinod M.
pros: The CRM, task management and chat functionality all work seamlessly. We utilize it to manage shipments, assign tasks and maintain all vendor communications.
cons: Bitrix can be daunting to beginners too many modules and functions to check before you can start your search.

review_title: All Services under One Advanced Umbrella
description: 24.7.12.365 cloud PM, VC, BIM persistent chatting rooms, and milestones project management guru.
author: Jesse D.
pros: Unique multi-purposed UFI design for mega and encrypt project and tasks management and UC, UCaaS and BIM services under one umbrella.
cons: I'm much OK with all modules it has, nothing to air for now.

review_title: Bitrix gets the job done.
description: Used Bitrix for patient enrollment to pull up their accounts and keep notes on services or appointments.
author: Carla O.
pros: Can be used for more than one thing. Similar to Salesforce, it was meant for another type of function but works just fine for our purposes. Its got a lot of features that are very helpful.
cons: The navigating can be difficult depending on what you are trying to do. If you leave a page, you have to start completely over.

review_title: Bitrix as a user
description: I really like about Bitrix24 is at it brings everything together in one place. we can have chat convesation with teammates can schedule meeting , we can even make our daily task and update there , what has been done at that day , it good for tracking . it has mobile access as well .
author: Mahe Z.
pros: I really like about Bitrix24 is at it brings everything together in one place. we can have chat convesation with teammates can schedule meeting . and it is easy to use .
cons: Limited time for free version of bitrix 24

review_title: General review
author: Yusuf A.
pros: Cheap, costumizable, always update and affordable
cons: Slow, bad support service, limited report dashboard

review_title: The comprehensive review of all details, frankly
description: Bitrix24 has a good and easy to engage with dashboards which help us to have a unified view over our projects in order to know what has been done and what's pending
author: Ali Z.
cons: The CRM system is so full of bugs and nasty little details they havent even thought about. Their webmail is the worst ever thing I have seen
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Bitrix, a GREAT team management platform
description: My use of Bitrix was mainly limited to the use of its messaging, for supervisors and other work colleagues. I never had any problems with those functionalities, maybe sometimes the chats were down and difficult to see when there were many members in a team, but the platform was functional. Also, the publications made by team leaders were shown in the “Feed” and could be “acknowledged” with a button to let them know they received the information.
author: Facundo G.
pros: Bitrix seemed to me to be a platform with a lot of functionalities that I did not use, but that, if they were used, I consider that it would provide fantastic utilities for that team. As for the messaging and notifications functionality, I found it very good and perhaps “traditional”, but effective.
cons: What I have to say is that the platform has many functionalities that perhaps are not taken advantage of because everything is quite messy and even chaotic due to the amount of elements on the screen that are seen, this should be improved.

review_title: Why Bitrix24 is the Best for BIM
author: Samuel M.
pros: Bitrix24 has a wide array of features which allows me to save time since I do not need to keep integrating with external apps. Instant messaging and live chat are the key features which I like using.
cons: Bitrix24 has nothing that I dislike since it facilitates all the capabilities that I need.
author_profession: General Manager and Head of Operations

review_title: Excellent project management program
description: I used it at one of my previous employer. Initially I find it complex but within few days I was able to learn about all its features.
author: Ankit D.
pros: It's a very good task management, team communication and project tracking tool. It offers a lot of good features like chats & video calls, meetings, calendar, time tracking, task reminders, document sharing etc.
cons: It has a complex user interface that for a newbie is difficult to understand. It is a costly program with limited customization options.

review_title: Try it - you'll like it!
description: Very good. Relatively easy to use and customise for our business.
author: Teresa H.
pros: Customisable, relatively easily with support from notes and bitrix chat support.
cons: Difficult to keep abreast of feature enhancements due to length of youtube videos and sometimes support notes are not easy to understand.

review_title: Bitrix24 is a good Task Management Software
description: Support is fast and solution orientated.
author: Pietro C.
pros: Many functions, acts a global enterprise solution.
cons: Some features and functions are not elaborated and thought well.

review_title: Support have good knowleage
description: I am more and less new, but they are good to help us
author: brian H.
pros: I get my solution and I can now work better
cons: The support Waite time was the worst, took to long time
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Does the job
description: Used for couple of years it has good functionality but not for a beginner
author: Cheryl M.
pros: It had good features and did what it needed to do
cons: Not the most user friendly interface found it complex at times
